problem id: 4059e1a5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10000101 -> 10111001
  00001101 -> 10001011
  10010001 -> 11111011
  11100001 -> 00111100
  00010100 -> 10101111
  01000110 -> 01101110
  10110011 -> 11110111
  11011010 -> 00011111

query: 00011110
predicted answer: 00000111
